{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Reaper of Worlds
| introduced = cradle-12-waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Eithan]] is the [[Reaper of Worlds]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c25">''Waybound'', chapter 25</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|When an [[Iteration]] could not be saved, it met the [[Reaper of Worlds]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c2">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Titles]]
